project_reference.core_research_question: Can rQFC be reformulated and justified beyond braneworld holographic semiclassical gravity without losing the benchmark consequences already established in the literature?
project_reference.current_focus: Phase 01 benchmark ingredient ledger and comparison setup

scope.question: Can the restricted quantum focusing conjecture be extended beyond braneworld semiclassical gravity, and what minimal assumptions are sufficient?
in_scope: Map non-braneworld settings where rQFC is already tested or plausibly provable
Isolate the model-independent ingredients behind the braneworld proof
Formulate a candidate extension strategy that matches known JT-gravity and d>2 consequences
out_of_scope: A full proof of the unrestricted QFC in arbitrary semiclassical gravity
Numerical checks unrelated to null deformations or generalized entropy
unresolved_questions: Which ingredients of the braneworld proof are indispensable rather than holographic conveniences?
What replaces higher-dimensional Einstein-dual control in generic non-braneworld settings?

context_gaps: Need a precise non-braneworld formulation of the entropy-variation data required by the proof strategy
crucial_inputs: The braneworld proof structure in arXiv:2212.03881
The Theta -> 0 improved-energy-condition limit in arXiv:2310.14396
The JT-gravity and d>2 tests in arXiv:2510.13961

formulations: Null-deformation analysis of generalized entropy and quantum expansion
Comparison between braneworld, JT-gravity, and generic QFT/CFT formulations
allowed_estimator_families: Analytic reduction to QNEC- or entropy-variation inequalities
Model-by-model comparison against published proofs and counterexamples
forbidden_estimator_families: Pure analogy to holography without checking entropy-functional control
Claims based only on unrestricted-QFC intuition after explicit counterexamples
forbidden_fit_families: Ad hoc generalization that does not reproduce known benchmark cases
stop_and_rethink_conditions: A proposed extension cannot recover the braneworld proof ingredients or conflicts with the JT-gravity tests
The strategy relies on assumptions already falsified by counterexamples to the stronger QFC

observables.name: Minimal ingredient set for rQFC
observables.definition: Classification of assumptions sufficient to derive rQFC-like inequalities beyond braneworlds

observables.name: Non-braneworld benchmark cases
observables.definition: Catalog of benchmark settings and whether the candidate ingredient set matches existing evidence

claims.statement: A viable beyond-braneworld extension strategy for rQFC must reproduce the braneworld benchmark, remain consistent with the Theta -> 0 improved-energy-condition limit, and accommodate the JT-gravity / d>2 tests without invoking braneworld holography as an unexplained black box.

deliverables.description: Literature map of restricted QFC ingredients and benchmark cases

must_contain: comparison to JT gravity and d>2 tests

acceptance_tests.subject: claim-main
acceptance_tests.procedure: Check that the proposed strategy explicitly reproduces the benchmark logic and assumptions of Restricted Quantum Focusing (arXiv:2212.03881).
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: Every indispensable step in the extension strategy maps to a corresponding benchmark ingredient or is justified as a controlled replacement.

acceptance_tests.subject: claim-main
acceptance_tests.procedure: Check consistency with the Theta -> 0 improved-energy-condition limit and with the JT-gravity / d>2 tests.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: No step contradicts arXiv:2310.14396 or arXiv:2510.13961, and the strategy explains why those settings are compatible with rQFC beyond braneworlds.

acceptance_tests.subject: deliv-strategy
acceptance_tests.procedure: Review whether the strategy identifies concrete missing assumptions and explicit failure modes rather than generic optimism.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: The writeup names at least one decisive obstruction and at least one concrete next derivation target.

references.locator: Arvin Shahbazi-Moghaddam, Restricted Quantum Focusing, Phys. Rev. D 109 (2024) 066023, arXiv:2212.03881
references.why_it_matters: Primary benchmark paper proving rQFC in braneworld semiclassical gravity subject to a technical assumption.

references.locator: Ido Ben-Dayan, The Quantum Focusing Conjecture and the Improved Energy Condition, JHEP 02 (2024) 132, arXiv:2310.14396
references.why_it_matters: Derives the Theta -> 0 improved quantum null energy condition and suggests a field-theory route, but does not by itself prove general non-braneworld rQFC.

references.locator: Victor Franken, Sami Kaya, François Rondeau, Arvin Shahbazi-Moghaddam, Patrick Tran, Tests of restricted Quantum Focusing and a new CFT bound, arXiv:2510.13961
references.why_it_matters: Provides the latest non-braneworld benchmark evidence by proving rQFC in JT gravity and deriving a stronger d>2 consequence.

forbidden_proxies.subject: claim-main
forbidden_proxies.proxy: Stating that any model with QNEC-like behavior probably satisfies rQFC
forbidden_proxies.reason: This would ignore the stronger structure singled out by the braneworld proof and the newer JT/CFT tests.

weakest_anchors: The minimal replacement for higher-dimensional Einstein-dual control in a general non-braneworld proof
unvalidated_assumptions: That the entropy-function variation data used in the braneworld proof admits a state-independent reformulation beyond holographic control
competing_explanations: The current non-braneworld successes may rely on low-dimensional or highly symmetric structure rather than a general mechanism
disconfirming_observations: A candidate extension requires assumptions stronger than those needed in the JT-gravity proof or fails to reproduce the strengthened d>2 consequence from arXiv:2510.13961

position.current_phase_name: Benchmark braneworld rQFC proof and extract indispensable ingredients
position.last_activity_desc: Session 6 audited citations, equation claims, and stale state values

active_calculations: Mapping the benchmark braneworld proof into a minimal ingredient ledger
Comparing the benchmark ledger against the `Theta -> 0` limit and the JT/d>2 benchmark tests
Theta -> 0 limit comparison against the improved energy condition
JT-gravity and d>2 consequence compatibility table

intermediate_results.description: Benchmark literature result: subject to a technical assumption, rQFC is proved in brane-world semiclassical gravity theories holographically dual to higher-dimensional Einstein gravity
intermediate_results.validity: brane-world semiclassical gravity under the assumptions of arXiv:2212.03881
verification_records: 2026-04-09: Cross-checked title, author, abstract claim, and arXiv/INSPIRE mapping against arXiv:2212.03881.

intermediate_results.description: The Theta -> 0 limit yields the improved quantum null energy condition (INEC)
intermediate_results.validity: Theta -> 0 limit as stated in arXiv:2310.14396; this is a limiting-case constraint rather than a standalone general proof of non-braneworld rQFC
verification_records: 2026-04-09: Cross-checked equation and scope against arXiv:2310.14396 and INSPIRE; dimensional audit passes when the affine parameter has length dimension and A is the local transverse area element.

intermediate_results.description: Non-braneworld benchmark result: rQFC is proved in a class of d=2 JT-gravity plus QFT toy models
intermediate_results.validity: class of d=2 toy models studied in arXiv:2510.13961
verification_records: 2026-04-09: Cross-checked title, author list, abstract claim, and INSPIRE mapping against arXiv:2510.13961.

intermediate_results.description: In a broad class of d>2 states, rQFC forbids QNEC saturation faster than O(A) as the transverse area shrinks to zero
intermediate_results.validity: broad class of d>2 states as stated in arXiv:2510.13961
verification_records: 2026-04-09: Cross-checked the d>2 consequence against the arXiv:2510.13961 abstract; the prior wording was weakened and is now sharpened to the explicit O(A) statement.

open_questions: Which steps in arXiv:2212.03881 are indispensable rather than braneworld conveniences?
What exactly replaces higher-dimensional Einstein-dual control in a general non-braneworld proof?
How strong is the d>2 consequence of arXiv:2510.13961 as a constraint on any extension program?
Which step in the benchmark proof depends essentially on braneworld bulk Einstein dynamics?
Is the JT-gravity success in arXiv:2510.13961 low-dimensional accident or evidence for a general mechanism?
What exact small-area behavior in d>2 is forced by rQFC beyond ordinary QNEC saturation?

decisions.summary: Anchor the project on the benchmark, limit, and latest non-braneworld test papers
decisions.rationale: This preserves concrete scope and prevents the extension program from drifting into unanchored generality

decisions.summary: Treat unrestricted QFC as a constraint source rather than the main target
decisions.rationale: Known stronger-QFC failures should stress-test the restricted program, not redefine it

approximations.name: Restricted limit as diagnostic probe
approximations.current_value: used only as a limiting-case benchmark

approximations.name: Semiclassical control of generalized entropy
approximations.controlling_param: backreaction strength relative to geometric area term

convention_lock.natural_units: c = k_B = 1 with G and hbar explicit unless quoting source formulas
convention_lock.coordinate_system: affine null generators with transverse coordinates y on codimension-2 cuts

blockers: No callable local new-project write pass was exposed; project files had to be bootstrapped from the canonical GPD templates after state.json contract setup.

session.stopped_at: Session 5 complete: reran validations, exercised write paths, and narrowed live GPD issues

handoff.stopped_at: Session 5 complete: reran validations, exercised write paths, and narrowed live GPD issues
